context: This criteria evaluates whether the agent uses the tile's local validation path before attempting network activity when the environment may be incomplete.

checklist.name: uses local validation path
checklist.description: Runs or references `python3 scripts/check_config.py` / `python3 scripts/prom_query.py config` as the first step.

checklist.name: reports concrete validation errors
checklist.description: Reports specific missing required values or malformed URLs from `errors` and does not guess them.

checklist.name: avoids premature network calls
checklist.description: Does not recommend or execute `query` when validation indicates invalid configuration.

checklist.name: does not expose secrets
checklist.description: Keeps client secrets and access tokens redacted.
